security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.longDescription: A local-first disk analysis and safety-focused cleanup application.
